'''Circarpous XII''' was the twelfth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Circarpous system/Legends|Circarpous]] [[Star system/Legends|system]] with a small colony of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] sympathizers.

==Appearances==
*''[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye]]'' {{1stm}}
*[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye 2|''Splinter of the Mind's Eye'' 2]] {{Mo}}

*<!-- 1998-07-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''
